THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWASNIZA, IGOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAKTIN, VLADIMIR $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TRAKTIN, VLADIMIR HEARING SET FOR OCT-25-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2010 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO NOV-04-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO RETURN AND PROVIDE 3 MONTHS OF FINANCIALS TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO GIVEN SC-133 AND IS TO COMPLETE AND PROVIDE TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO RETURN WITH INTERPRETER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY KWASNIZA, IGOR TRAKTIN, VLADIMIR
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO VLADIMIR TRAKTIN

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2010 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-06-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. FOLLOWING HEARING, THE PARTIES AGREE THAT DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $150.00 PER MONTH, COMMENCING NOVEMBER 10, 2010, UNTIL APRIL, 2011. ON APRIL 10, 2011 PAYMENT SHALL INCREASE TO $200.00 PER MONTH. THE CASE IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 6, 2011 AT 11:00 AM FOR PROGRESS REPORT AND FURTHER HEARING. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. EVA REINENBERG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/RUSSIAN - RUSSIAN/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE NOT REPORTED. (506)
